commands.review_summary:
This PR changes `mergeAttemptToolMediaPayloads` so `toolTrustedLocalMedia` bypasses the `message_tool_only` source-reply-mirror media suppression and adds a focused helper regression test.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +33. Total +36 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main has a guard that drops pending trusted TTS media from message-tool-only source-reply mirror payloads. This read-only review did not run a live Discord or Telegram reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor real behavior proof and maintainer review of the end-to-end channel evidence, not a narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to make.

target.title: fix(tts): allow trusted local media in message_tool_only mode
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes **openclaw/openclaw#83636** - Dynamic TTS auto-delivery is suppressed in message-tool-only channel contexts.

## The Bug

The  function in  was blocking ALL tool media when , including trusted local media like agent-generated TTS audio. This caused dynamic TTS tool results to not be delivered to Telegram/Discord even though the audio was newly created by the agent.

## The Fix

Added a bypass condition: when  is true, the media is allowed through even in  mode. This preserves the existing protection against duplicate delivery for untrusted media while allowing agent-generated content (like TTS) to reach the user.

## Changed Files

-  - Added  check to allow trusted local media through
-  - Added test case for trusted local media bypass

## Test Results

```
✓ 6 tests passed in tool-media-payloads.test.ts
``"

## Notes

- This is a minimal, focused fix targeting the specific bug in #83636
- Does not affect Telegram-only channels; the fix is in the shared media delivery logic
- All existing tests continue to pass
